svg.title: RAG techniques recommended for personal-dungeon-master
svg.desc: A structural diagram showing five RAG technique layers mapped to the two knowledge bases (DM world knowledge and player journey knowledge) in the personal-dungeon-master project.

g.text: Act, chapter, scene prepended to each chunk
Multi-chunk scene windows at query time
Persists across sessions — already built in
Switch strategy: combat vs social vs travel
Trim to token budget per turn
Assembles: DM persona · rules section · revealed campaign window · graph memory · session window
